creator: sergey.v.brunov@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 149231
The modified version of port directory.

Hello!

Trying to update MonoDevelop to more recent version.
Having problems with NUnit compilation (please see pkg-plist.new file).

Can someone assist to complete the port update?
This link seems to be useful: https://bugzilla.xamarin.com/show_bug.cgi?id=23696.

The attachment is not a patch, but the modified version of port directory.

Best regards,
Sergey Brunov.
